other_findings.finding: Among the T cells, Tregs have the highest expression of FOXP3, CTLA4 and IL2RA
CXCL14 is highly expressed in placode, matrix and POSTN+ basal cells and is predicted to recruit Tregs
RNAscope validation shows FOXP3+ Tregs localising around hair follicles at 15 PCW
Quantification of FOXP3+ cells shows preferential localization in peri-follicular vs inter-follicular areas

evidence_quotes.quote: Among the T cells, Tregs have the highest expression of FOXP3, CTLA4 and IL2RA.
evidence_quotes.context: Violin plot analysis of Treg marker genes in prenatal skin

evidence_quotes.quote: peri-follicular (top right) and inter-follicular (bottom right) RNAscope images of prenatal skin (representative 15 PCW sample) demonstrating ORS (SLC26A7), matrix (SHH), dermal papilla (NDP) with Tregs (FOXP3) localising around the hair follicle
evidence_quotes.context: Spatial validation of Treg location in prenatal skin
